summary:
SPIRITUAL VISIONS OF ITALY AND THE DEMONIC SMOG: Brandon describes a spiritual vision where he was positioned high above Italy, observing a thick, black smog covering the water and moving through houses. He explains that God revealed this dark blanket represented rampant corruption and sex trafficking stretching across the country. Brandon recounts seeing a massive, living, swirling portal above the Pompeii region, emitting pink, blue, and purple clouds. From this portal, thousands of angels descended in a staircase formation before scattering at the speed of light toward individual homes. He notes that the angels were urgently waving their hands to warn residents to leave, until a wave of intercessory prayers from Christians caused the angels to freeze and return into the portal.

THE CANARY IN THE COAL MINE AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon details a subsequent vision featuring a yellow canary swinging in a cage inside a cave. He describes a mist-like gas rising from the ground, which rapidly killed the bird. He connects this imagery to toxic volcanic gases emerging from the ground in Italy, specifically related to the Campi Flegrei volcano and a recent earthquake. Brandon also recounts warnings about the water in the gulf area near Pompeii, seeing massive waves, falling rocks, devastation, and hearing sirens while observing that people were ignoring the incoming danger.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS: Brandon recounts receiving repeated warnings from God regarding the American electrical grid. He describes foreseeing a cyberattack or a false flag event that causes massive blackouts in major metropolitan areas, specifically mentioning New York City. He notes seeing a calendar indicating the power grid could be down for over three weeks in certain regions. Brandon recalls a previous prophetic warning he received regarding a severe winter storm in Texas, which led to widespread power grid failures, frozen windmills, burst pipes, and contaminated water. He shares his personal preparations of purchasing large quantities of water and references backup equipment like tri-fuel generators, solar power, and emergency lighting, clarifying that the future outages will target specific major cities rather than the entire nation simultaneously.

INTERCESSORY PRAYER FOR PROTECTION AND RESTORATION: Brandon leads an extensive prayer covering multiple topics, beginning with the protection of Italy from the ongoing volcanic and seismic activities. He then prays against cyberattacks and false flag operations targeting the United States power grid, specifically asking for wisdom for the NSA, Homeland Security, and the Army to block foreign adversaries. Furthermore, Brandon prays for supernatural financial harvests, declaring debt cancellation, job promotions, and financial prosperity. He continues by commanding healing for various health issues, including cancer, diabetes, Alzheimer's, PTSD, and addictions to alcohol and prescription medications. Finally, he commands an end to regional droughts, calling for low-pressure systems and abundant rain, and prays for government officials, specifically mentioning Joe Biden, to possess godly wisdom.
rawData: [October 03, 2023]-[The Lord showed me angels descending into Italy through a portal]-[https://youtu.be/5CWynywOvK0]-[Good morning, family. I'm excited to be with you again today; I think this is the third video in a row. This video is pretty serious. The Lord has put on my heart—I'm going to tell you the things I've been praying about. I've been praying over Italy and all the little tremors and the volcano. I'm going to tell you what I saw. I was caught up in the Spirit. I was just praying in the Spirit, I was worshiping, and all of a sudden I was shot up. I was looking over Italy, and Italy was so small. I was so high—I guess that's the way I want to say it—I was really, really high and I was looking down. All of a sudden, I could see a black blanket over the water over Italy. It looked like a thick cloud, but it was as black as molasses—very, very dark. It was all over the water and there were black clouds going through all the houses. It looked like a smog all around the houses. I could see the rooftops of the homes because I was up, and I could see the lights on in the houses. Angels were descending into Italy. Above, the Lord pointed my attention to a massive circle, a humongous portal that was over the country of Italy. It was over where the earthquake happened last night, where I told you the volcano is at by Pompeii. There was this massive portal and there were angels in it. The angels were coming out of this massive portal, and the portal was like it was breathing—it was alive. It was swirling, and there were clouds all in it. It looked like it was opening up, and all of a sudden these angels started coming out of this massive portal—thousands of them. They were all coming down like a staircase. It was like they were all descending, but they were lined up like soldiers coming out of this massive portal over Italy. It looked like they were coming downstairs, but I could not see stairs. Through the portal, there were clouds coming out as the portal was breathing and turning. It was swirling; it was alive. The clouds coming out of the portal were humongous and beautiful—pink, blue, and purple. I believe it was Heaven. These angels were all coming down and descending onto the Earth. When they got to a certain place in the atmosphere between the portal and the Earth, they started to spread out like ants all over the place. They started scattering and they were coming even faster down onto those homes. All of a sudden, each angel was going to a place; they were on a mission, moving at the speed of light. They were moving down, and they all had beautiful robes and gowns on. It was the most amazing thing. The whole time, I'm sitting here in this chair praying in the Spirit and seeing all this, soaking it all in. I'm trying so hard to explain everything the Lord showed me in detail: the black smog. I was asking the Lord what all that black smog was. He showed me that from coast to coast, there's a lot of sex trafficking in Italy. I don't know if people don't know about it, but he was showing that there was a lot of corruption and trafficking in Italy. There was sand and things he was showing me about this. Those angels were coming down, going to these homes, and they were making a motion with their hand, like 'Come on,' telling the people to leave. It was a warning. Every angel was waving the people to come on. They did this for several minutes. In the Spirit, you couldn't really tell a time frame, but you could sense an urgency on their faces. It felt like such an urgency of a warning, telling the people to leave. They didn't say anything; I could just see by their body language that they were in a hurry. All of a sudden, all of the angels stopped their arms, and I knew people were praying. I could feel the intercessory prayers from the saints, from the Christians, from people interceding for Italy in the Spirit, praying in tongues. You could feel the blanket of prayer coming out of that portal. You could feel the intercessory prayer going on. All of a sudden, all the angels froze and turned their bodies to look back up to the massive swirling light, the portal. All of a sudden, they started shooting back up into that portal, and then it was over. Then the Lord took me to another part of the vision. He said, 'I want you to focus on the canary. A canary Braden, what is the meaning of a canary in a coal mine? Study this out.' I saw a yellow canary in a cave, and there were gases. I could see a gas coming up out of the ground like a smog. The canary was swinging in a cage. I saw this birdcage in the spirit realm. I saw the canary on the little swing, swinging back and forth and chirping. All of a sudden, I looked down because I could see this mist-like gas coming up out of the ground. I took my eyes off the canary, and when I looked back, the canary was dead in the bottom of the cage—lifeless and completely gone. It happened so quickly; the gases came up and took the canary out. This is part of the vision the Lord showed me about the angels and this gas coming up out of the ground in Italy. I don't know what that was—if it was from the volcano or whatever. But I told you all I saw hundreds of thousands of people go home. I saw a massive wave coming. The Lord said, 'Pay attention to the water.' I saw the earthquakes in the water, and the people weren't paying attention. The water was what the Lord kept putting my attention to in the past visions—look at the water in the coves. He kept pointing me to that in the spirit realm. I could see with my spirit eyes what the Lord was showing me: the water in the gulf area right there by Pompeii. This is just what the Lord is showing me. I know, like I said, a major 4.4, I believe, happened last night. I saw all the rocks and the devastation, the people, and the sirens going off. There was a video my wife gave me from someone on Facebook; they were putting it on their feed there, and she was showing me, saying, 'Listen to this.' So I looked at it and I was like, 'Oh my goodness.' I guess this just happened yesterday, last night—it was our night—so not even 12 to 24 hours ago. The electric grid situation is escalating, and things are really getting intense. Okay, number two: for the past week, even from last Monday—not yesterday Monday, but the week prior—three times now the Lord has spoken to me about the electric grid in America, telling me, 'Pray over the electric grid. This is very serious.' I saw a cyberattack or it was a false flag attack. Like I said, I'm not going to just flat out say it was Russia or whoever; I'm telling you I saw something go on with our electric grid, and all of a sudden power went out in New York and major cities. It was completely dark everywhere because of what happened on this electric grid issue. And so He said, 'You're not taking this serious enough.' He warned me, saying, 'You need to pray about this more intently because of what is being planned and plotted.' I saw when the electric grid went down, for some people, it had the opportunity to be down for over three weeks. I saw the number three—for over three weeks. I saw a calendar, and I could see the days go by with people being without power. The Lord was warning me about these major cities and about this plot against America and about the power grid. Now, I don't know a timeframe or anything else about that. All I know is I'm interceding for this. This is on top of the Italy thing that He brought to my attention, warning me about it. Like I tried to tell you all about what He showed me a year ago about investing into a generator that had three fuel types—propane, gas, and natural gas—and having electricity for what was coming in the future, powering your home, finding ways to power your home through solar. They sell lights on Amazon, there's candles, there's all kinds of stuff for people to have light. I don't want to ever preach fear; I don't want to be a Debbie Downer and come on here and go wacko all the time, but I get these things from the Spirit of God, these warnings, and they're very intense. He warns me about things. For instance, I was praying over an ice storm one time, and He was telling me about Texas being without power. I kept seeing 'without power,' I kept seeing 'no heat,' I kept seeing a poisoning of the water—something was wrong with the water. I believe it was about three years now that they had a major cold front; a major arctic front came down out of the Arctic and through Canada, and really made everything really cold in Texas. They could not handle the electric load for all of the people trying to heat their homes, so the electric grid shut down because the windmills froze. All of the pipes in the houses burst because people were trying to drip their faucets, and so it shut down all of the water. They put out a warning not to drink the water because it had E. coli and all kinds of stuff, and you had to boil it before you could drink it. This lasted for quite a while, but before that happened, the Lord warned me to warn friends that lived in Texas and told them, 'You need to get at least 12 cases of water.' So I took it on myself, not knowing where it would affect me, so I went out and bought all the water too because of what I was seeing in the spirit; it was very alarming. It had nothing to do with my household; we had a lot of water to drink for a while. When you're seeing in the spirit, I always want to tell you: this does not always affect everybody. There's a lot of ground to cover from Canada to Mexico, from the Atlantic to the Pacific. Whenever I'm seeing in the spirit, I don't want to always alarm everybody and say the power's going out for all of America, because I don't believe that. I want you to be praying about this for your own household. It could be New York; like I said, I saw New York, I saw a major city, and I believe it was New York, but I don't want to assume. It could be Chicago, but I saw a lot of big buildings. So I want to warn you all to pray about the power grid with me. This is serious. Instead of going, 'Well, I'm just going to go out and buy everything off of Amazon from coast to coast,' because the power grid's not going to go down for the whole country for three weeks. I don't believe that. I believe that certain areas, just like my story about Dallas and what the Lord was showing me there. I thought, because I live in Oklahoma, that this was going to be about Oklahoma, all the power going out and the water going bad, and I'm trying to warn everybody. But I'm seeing in part, I'm hearing in part. When you're doing that, I always try to be quick to obey whenever He tells me something. This was a word for Texas, and it affected a lot of people in Texas—hundreds of thousands of people—and they were without power for two weeks or more. It was bad. No heat, and people were staying in sleeping bags and trying to keep warm with their families, and pipes were bursting everywhere; it was a mess. Like I said, I get these cues. Those are the three things: about Campi Flegrei in Italy and the electric grid. I hope this video blessed you. I try to give you things the Lord has given me in prayer and keep you all updated. Let's pray. I believe we can intercede right now for the people of Italy and for the people of America. Father, I thank You. Lord, right now in the name of Jesus, we lift up Italy. We lift up this volcano and the earthquakes taking place. You said, Lord, that perilous times would come. You warned us that there would be earthquakes in diverse places, there would be volcanoes and events that were fearful, that You said men's hearts would fail them for fear for looking after the things that were coming upon the earth. Father, I thank You that we are all awake and listening to what the Spirit of the Lord is saying. That we would hear Your voice, and a stranger's voice we would not follow. If we are in harm's way, if we are not listening to what the Spirit of the Lord said, shake us inside. Show us, Lord, what we're supposed to do for our families, that we'd hear You before danger comes, that we would know Your voice, Father, and that we would know the difference between the spirit of fear trying to torment us versus the Holy Ghost trying to warn us. That we will not be led by emotion; we would be led by the Holy Ghost. I pray for every single person watching this video, that they would learn to meditate on Your word and yield themselves to the Spirit of God and be able to hear Your voice clearly. We call clarity in their ears in the name of Jesus. With spiritual ears, we call supernatural giftings to see into the spirit realm, to know Your voice and hear warnings of danger. Father, I thank You that they would hear You right now concerning their lives. Clarity in the spirit, like tuning in a radio station to a clear channel, moving the antenna. 'God, I'm going to put myself at Your feet, and I will be at the spout where the glory comes out, and I am not going to be in fear about what the devil's doing, but I have authority over the devil.' And I'm going to have wisdom concerning this, and I'm not going to be moved by what I see or what I feel. I am moved by what the word of God says, and we're going to hear your voice, Father, and we're going to do exactly what you tell us to do. Father, I thank you for that. Father, I pray protection over the people over Italy. I pray protection over the believers, Father; they will be out of harm's way. Father, I thank you that those angels are coming out of that portal. I thank you, Lord, that you give a strong warning even in the midnight hour, in dreams and visions, and things like that to protect the people from what's coming. Father, I thank you, Lord, that whether it's about the electric grid over Miami, from L.A. to Phoenix to Denver to Seattle, wherever it may be—the warnings that you're giving me right now—I thank you, Father, that this will not happen. We take authority over these cyberattacks. We take authority over false flag events, and we say in the name of Jesus, you will not do this. In the name of Jesus, we plead the blood of Jesus over our power grid. We say we will have power; it will not disrupt life or cause people to lose their life because they need the electricity to survive. I thank you, Father, that there is a covering over these people. I thank you, Lord, that we would hear your voice concerning these things, and a stranger's voice we will not follow. In America, I thank you, Lord, that our people would be wise on how to handle things in our NSA and the computer people. Father, I thank you, Lord, that at Homeland Security, the people would know and they would know how to protect us—the Army, the Corps of Engineers—all the people. Father, I thank you that you give wisdom, revelation, and knowledge over these people to block attacks from foreign adversaries. And if it is a false flag or whatever, Father, we ask you, God, to expose all wicked plots and plans. Expose all wicked plans in Jesus' name—uncovering, and uncovering, and uncovering in Jesus' name. We believe we receive this right now in the name of Jesus. Now, Father, I pray over their finances. Every person who sowed and believes in their covenant for a supernatural harvest concerning their finances—I pray over their finances in the name of Jesus for a hundredfold return over what they sow. I speak to their finances right now in the name of Jesus; great blessing is on their houses, great prosperity is over their home. And God, I thank you, Lord, for jobs and better jobs, raises and bonuses, settlements, interest and income, rebates and returns, checks in the mail, gifts and surprises, finding money, bills paid off, blessing, and increase. Father, I thank you, Lord, that every need they have is met and every debt is canceled in the name of Jesus. Father, I pray over their health and their bodies in wholeness and wellness. In the name of Jesus, we take authority over sickness right now. We come against the sickness and disease; we come against manifestations of cancers, diabetes, heart disease, all kinds of dementia and Alzheimer's, and like I said, PTSD and all kinds of bondage from perversions. We command it to go now in Jesus' name. From all kinds of addictions—to alcohol, to prescription medications, from drugs to all kinds of bondage—we take authority over bondage right now in the name of Jesus. Strongholds be broken off of their lives; we call bondage and strongholds to be broken by the power of the Lord. We call the blood of Jesus over this right now. We plead the blood of Jesus over this. We thank you from the North to South, the East to West; we call angels to minister to us right now in Jesus' name. We thank you, Lord. We pray over rain and an abundance of rain over our areas. We break drought in the name of Jesus. We take authority over drought. We speak to the rain; we call the rain to come from the North, the South, the East, and the West. We call low-pressure systems to come in right now in the name of Jesus. We call forth low-pressure systems and the moisture to come up. We call rain to come; we claim rain, rain, rain in Jesus' name. The former rain and the latter rain, even the spiritual rain of the Holy Ghost, rain over this nation. We call an abundance of rain to come down right now in the name of Jesus. We call your outpouring of the spirit, Lord. Bring us a great outpouring, a great outflow of a great river, a tidal wave of your presence upon this nation. We pray over the leaders, over the people who are over this country, from Joe Biden all the way down. We pray for even the smallest person that's in power; we say in the name of Jesus, they would have wisdom. Father, I thank you, Lord, they would have a fear of the Lord inside of them to make godly decisions. In closing, Father, I just thank you, Lord. I thank you for your presence, for in your presence there's fullness of joy. Lord, we rest in you today. We take the care out of our prayer, for if you're begging, you're not believing. We thank you, Lord, for where the spirit of the Lord is, there is freedom, and we will not fear. We will not fear in Jesus' name. We plead the blood over our nation. We plead the blood of Jesus over this right now. I thank you, Father, that we have eyes to see what you have to show us, ears to hear, and I plead the blood of Jesus over us right now in Jesus' name. Amen. Well, okay. I thank you all for joining me today. I really do. I hope this has blessed you all. I really appreciate you taking the time to watch my videos. It means a lot to me. I'm new at this; I'm just learning like you all every day. Every day we learn and we follow after the voice of the Lord, and he is faithful. He's faithful to us. The presence of the Lord really settled in on me right there when I was praying. I saw some things I'd have to pray about. Well, y'all put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much, and I'm so thankful that you watched my video today. Y'all have a blessed day and we'll see you next time. Bye-bye.]
